name: Agfa Optima
description: Inspired by the Optima 200 film stock, this recipe was created with versatility in mind. It offers moderate saturation and contrast, paired with a subtle analog-like fade. Since it leans slightly high-key, you may want to underexpose slightly when shooting in harsh sunlight to preserve highlight detail. Enabling Active D-Lighting can help recover shadows, though it will slightly reduce overall contrast.
author: Mihai Serban
